requirements.requirement_text: When the front-left door changes from closed to open, the system shall immediately make the updated door status available to the display controller.
When the front-right door changes from open to closed, the system shall immediately make the updated door status available to the display controller.
When the rear-left door changes state, the system shall immediately communicate the updated status to the display controller.
When the rear-right door changes state, the system shall immediately communicate the updated status to the display controller.
The system shall periodically transmit its operational mode to the display controller at a fixed interval.
When engine temperature exceeds the safe operating limit, the system shall immediately activate the high-temperature warning
When engine temperature returns within safe operating limits, the system shall immediately deactivate the high-temperature warning.
The system shall evaluate vehicle speed, door status, and engine temperature together to determine whether one or more warnings must be activated.
If multiple warning conditions are active simultaneously, the system shall transmit all active warnings together in the same update to the instrument cluster.
If vehicle speed is greater than zero and any door transitions from closed to open, the system shall activate the door-open warning within the same communication cycle.
